entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A dryland cereal crop analyzed for commercial utilization and value chains

entities.name: MILLETS
entities.description: A group of small-seeded grasses used as cereal crops analyzed for commercial utilization and value chains

entities.name: COMMERCIAL UTILIZATION
entities.description: The use of crops for commercial purposes to inform crop improvement priorities

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of improving crop traits based on market demand

entities.name: MARKET DEMAND
entities.description: The consumer demand that drives priorities for crop improvement

entities.name: CGIAR RESEARCH PROGRAM ON DRYLAND CEREALS
entities.description: A research program setting priorities for dryland cereals in Eastern and Southern Africa

entities.name: EASTERN AND SOUTHERN AFRICA
entities.description: The geographic region of focus for the research program

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD CONSUMPTION
entities.description: The use of sorghum and millet grain for food within households

entities.name: VALUE CHAINS
entities.description: The sequence of processes from production to commercial utilization, including animal feed, flour, and beer

entities.name: ANIMAL FEED
entities.description: A commercial utilization product derived from sorghum and millets

entities.name: FLOUR
entities.description: A commercial utilization product derived from sorghum and millets

entities.name: BEER
entities.description: A commercial utilization product derived from sorghum and millets

entities.name: KENYA
entities.description: A country in Eastern Africa where value chain information was analyzed

entities.name: TANZANIA
entities.description: A country in Eastern Africa where value chain information was analyzed

entities.name: UGANDA
entities.description: A country in Eastern Africa where value chain information was analyzed

entities.name: ETHIOPIA
entities.description: A country in Eastern Africa where value chain information was analyzed

entities.name: SECONDARY DATA
entities.description: Data collected from existing sources used to analyze utilization

entities.name: PRIMARY DATA
entities.description: Data collected directly from sources used to analyze utilization

entities.name: NATIONAL STATISTICS
entities.description: Official data used to analyze the production of animal feed, flour, and beer

entities.name: INTERVIEWS
entities.description: Qualitative data collection from value chain actors regarding standards, pricing, and constraints

entities.name: QUALITY STANDARDS
entities.description: Requirements for the quality of sorghum and millet products

entities.name: PRICING
entities.description: The cost and pricing mechanisms of sorghum and millet products

entities.name: CONSTRAINTS
entities.description: Factors limiting the commercial utilization of sorghum and millets

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD SURVEYS
entities.description: Surveys used to estimate the commercialization of crops at the household level

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Center for Semi-Arid Tropics, which conducted household surveys
